formdata.value: Lesson file from local or link
This lesson covers the basics of JavaScript.

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl -X POST "http://your-api-domain/api/lessons" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN" \
  -F "language=English" \
  -F "section=665f0f3f7f1a8d89d9c12345" \
  -F "source=Lesson file from local or link" \
  -F "accessibility=free" \
  -F "uploadType=direct" \
  -F "fileUrl=@/path/to/your/local/file.mp4" \
  -F "isActive=true" \
  -F "dripContent[isEnabled]=true" \
  -F "dripContent[forcePreviousParts]=false" \
  -F "dripContent[accessAfterDays]=2" \
  -F "moduleId=665f0f1b7f1a8d89d9c67890" \
  -F "title=Introduction to JavaScript" \
  -F "description=This lesson covers the basics of JavaScript." \
  -F "type=video" \
  -F "content[videoLength]=15:32" \
  -F "content[transcript]=This is a sample transcript..." \
  -F "order=1" \
  -F "duration=15" \
  -F "isRequired=true" \
  -F "unlockConditions[mustCompletePrevious]=true" \
  -F "resources[pdf]=https://example.com/resources/js-basics.pdf" \
  -F "resources[slides]=https://example.com/resources/js-slides.pptx"
